dataset_citation: Gas Turbine CO and NOx Emission Data Set [Dataset]. (2019). UCI Machine Learning Repository. https://doi.org/10.24432/C5WC95.
name: gas_turbine_frozen_mu_sigma_mlp_seed42
split_protocol: Chronological split following the UCI recommendation: first three years as the training/cross-validation pool, last two years as test; the last validation fraction of the train pool is used as validation.
variant_description: Uses a frozen linear mean regressor for mu and learns only sigma with a 3-layer MLP. This adapts the fixed-mu idea to tabular regression where inputs and targets do not share a space.
